title: Glock 17
body:
# This resourcepack requires CIT Resewn!

This is just a fun silly little texture pack that lets you change a crossbow into a gun.
Just rename a crossbow to "_glock 17_"

Made by _**Quayru**_

![gun](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ba8ec399e4d0415753874dc401df722b449ad81.png)
